== Notes for [[Item:Q56769|Q56769]] ==

Fuente: Geni, Enrique Villareal

Fuente: La gran propiedad en Cocula de Ávalos 1539-1700 Bocanegra, Mucha tierra y pocos dueños. Rodolfo Fernández. Conaculta 1999

--------------------
=== GEDCOM Source ===

@@R-1262306719@@ Ancestry Family Trees Online publication - Provo, UT, USA: Ancestry.com. Original data: Family Tree files submitted by Ancestry members.
=== GEDCOM Source ===
Ancestry Family Tree http://trees.ancestry.com/pt/AMTCitationRedir.aspx?tid=39806366&pid=7834

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
